title: HTS-110 - Cryogen-Free High-Tc Superconducting Magnet System Design and Manufacture
note: NZ incumbent (founded 2004) designing and manufacturing cryogen-free HTS magnet systems for NMR, metrology (3 T), beamline; sells to labs and OEM partners — occupies C15's claimed whitespace.

title: HTS-110 and Stelar launch compact benchtop NMR instrument
note: 3Tracer 2.0 FFC relaxometer: 56 kg benchtop cryogen-free HTS NMR magnet embedded in an OEM instrument; HTS-110 roadmap of catalog magnet family up to 400 MHz (9.4 T), all single-phase — exactly C15's product, already launched.

title: Cryogen Free Superconducting Magnet Systems
note: US catalog vendor; first commercial 4.2 K pulse-tube system in 1999; prior OEM supply agreements (magnetic separation, gyrotron); delivers complete turnkey systems incl. cryostat, cryocooler, supplies, software.

title: Magnetica - Australia's MRI System Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM)
note: Magnetica merged with Scientific Magnetics and Tecmag (Jan 2021) to form a compact-MRI OEM with in-house cryogen-free superconducting magnets (3 T extremity) — the one-pager's own beachhead-pricing source [S074] is a direct competitor.

title: Scientific Magnetics - Superconducting magnet systems
note: UK vendor with ~20 yrs of standard and bespoke wet/dry (cryogen-free) superconducting magnets for end-users and OEM partners; consultancy for Siemens, Rolls-Royce.

title: Tesla Engineering Ltd - Magnet Division
note: Established superconducting magnet manufacturer; expanded facilities to produce UHF MRI magnets for GE, other OEMs and end users — third-party magnet supply to OEMs already exists at scale.

title: TE Magnetics (Tokamak Energy HTS magnet division)
note: >$60M invested; quench-safe, compact, cost-effective HTS magnets (Ultra Compact Insulation) marketed for science, medicine, data-centre power, propulsion — a heavily funded entrant into standardized HTS magnet modules.

title: 超导磁体龙头健信超导科创板IPO：推动国产替代，助力产业升级
note: 宁波健信超导 (STAR 688805): world's largest independent MRI magnet supplier; 1.5T 无液氦 (zero-helium) magnet certified 国际首台(套); ~4.2% global superconducting-magnet share (#5 global, #2 domestic); customers Fujifilm, GE Healthcare, Esaote, 万东, 安科 — independent-magnet niche is thin and already led by a scaled, cheap Chinese player.

title: Fourier 80 — 80 MHz benchtop NMR with high-performance, cryogen-free permanent magnet
note: Vendor primary: benchtop NMR uses cryogen-free permanent magnet, no liquid He/N2. Replaces Wikipedia entry per audit fix #2.

title: Preclinical MRI 3T - 4.7T - 7T - 9.4T - Variable field - Cryogen-free
note: Catalog cryogen-free dry superconducting magnets 3-9.4 T shipping today in compact preclinical MRI — the 'catalog component' vision already exists commercially.

title: 四家值得关注的国产磁共振核心硬件企业
note: 辰光医疗 (430300): MRI core-component supplier to Philips (~16 yr relationship), 万东, 朗润; custom 0.2-11 T magnets incl. 无液氦; domestic magnet component ecosystem already serves Chinese OEMs — undercuts C15's 'sell to Chinese importers' angle.

title: 联创超导：已在超导磁体及应用端装备集成上积累大量技术优势
note: 联创超导 claims capability to design/build >15 T large-bore HTS magnet systems (induction heating, MCZ crystal growth, compact fusion) on 上海超导 tape — Chinese HTS magnet integration capacity is funded and expanding.
